::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, sf)
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
rdacc_sf <- read_csv("data/archive/thai_road_accident_2019_2022.csv") %>%
  filter(!is.na(longitude) & longitude !='',
        !is.na(latitude) & latitude != '') %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", 'latitude'),
           crs=4326) %>% #WGS 84 - USE BY ALL GPS
  st_transform(crs=32647) #PROJECTED PCS UTM IS 326, 47 NORTH 
```
:::
